blocks.text: Harold was a brave and friendly token. His fate was full of drama, but he was able to preserve his lust for life and his faith even in this cursed land. If there any good resided here, it was in Harold. He died, but his death was not in vain. Blessed be he, our friend and hero!

This guy was not good at anything. But he knew how to stay calm even in the most difficult situations. He could fall asleep during battle. It was hard to imagine what might knock him off balance. Obviously, cozy sofas, nice music and a lot of treats on the yacht threw his vigilance. Or he just decided to get a good night's sleep before he died. In any case, we will miss your calmness, indifference and jokes.

The world was enthralled by her beauty and voice. Even in a deadly desert where there is no place for beauty, her appearance always adorned our dreary existence. To us, Stacey was a symbol of the beautiful and happy life that we have lost. She refused to change, even though the world around her had changed completely. And even though she was an arrogant bitch, right next to her we all felt the hope that the world could return to normal. Now there is no hope for us.

Beck experienced the most cheerful of deaths. Apparently. Everyone knew that he was running out of stuff, and his last joint was to be smoked on the yacht. He just wanted to eat, drink and have fun. When we looked into his eyes, we understood that. Without the next joint he wouldn't have reconciled with this world. Perhaps he succumbed to the most enjoyable of all possible deaths here.

His death was heroic. He sacrificed himself when he realized that the wolves’ yacht was a trap. Arnold decided to escort his comrades, to save them from the wolf attack in case of danger. But he could not help. He gorged on the food more ravenously than the others and fell victim to the trap of the cunning wolves.

Teri lost his flock, but he did not lose his faith in God. We mocked him, but were secretly envious that he had a hope that we did not have. For some, his decision to indulge in sin in the clutches of death was an opportunity for caustic jokes, for others, it was a revelation. But we all lost a friend who was a symbol of tranquility and confidence in his righteousness. We thought that he would give up his life, but that he would never give up his faith. Well, he died and did not even remember his God. Let's hope that there is no God at all, otherwise Teri might have angered him greatly.

Vacio was like a defenseless child to us. She said that she saw the future, but no one really believed her. And now we know for sure that she was just crazy. After all, you don't have to be an oracle to predict the fate that awaits you on a yacht with wolves. Vacio was the weakest of us all. In our world, it is very difficult to be weak. Rest in peace, Vacio, a girl who saw the future, but saw it badly.
